algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived means-of-egress ramp for clinic level change
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: ramp for small elevation change. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ramp_run_model_note: Public scenario model uses ramp_run_length_ft >= rise_ft / running_slope.
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Design optimization ramp variant: clinic level change, fixed rise_ft 2.0, tighter available run, compactness-weighted objective.

query_preferences.meaning: prefer compact ramp run while maintaining minimum landing dimension

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Design optimization ramp variant: clinic level change, fixed rise_ft 2.0, tighter available run, compactness-weighted objective.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains a helper expression such as max(), abs(), symbolic division, or a variable product.
